content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Treat lastmod, changefreq, and priority as untrusted scheduling hints verified against observed representation history.

hints: For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Sitemap Hint Evidence model · Theory Sitemap Hint Eviden…, name the owner, permission, revision, Go, seed, URL, scope, robots, response, body, tree, record, frontier, goroutine, accessibility, report, cleanup, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Sitemap Hint Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Sitemap Hint Evidence model · Theory Sitemap Hint Eviden…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory Go team handles case 7907 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to stream bounded sitemap XML and index graphs through host, scope, hint, and provenance admission; browser Go remains deterministic and free of native network, parser, filesystem, process, and host effects; then change one tokenizer, goquery, selector, domain constructor, record, link, frontier, or trap case and retain rejected evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Treat lastmod, changefreq, and priority as untrusted scheduling hints verified against observed representation history.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Sitemap Hint Evidence model · Theory Sitemap Hint Eviden…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: lastmod guarantees the actual page change time.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-go-sitemap-hint-evidence-1mwpxp(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_crawler_go_sitemap_hint_evidence_1mwpxp\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?sitemapEntries < 15)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?accountedEntries < 14 \|\| accountedEntries > sitemapEntries)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?indexCases < 5)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?unboundedEdges > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
